title: Villagers +
description: This project (mod) will add more professions of villagers to your game world.
body: This very small mod will add 4 new professions to your minecraft game world. They are a Redstoner, a Copper Processor, a Miner and a Lumberjack. The mod will also add 2 new items: a Copper workbench and a Redstone table. With this mod, you can bargain with new professions of residents. I'll make an update soon!
